kinesisanalyticsv2.application.Applicati.Description: Use this parameter to configure the application.
To create a Kinesis Data Analytics Studio notebook, you must set the mode to `INTERACTIVE`. However, for a Kinesis Data Analytics for Apache Flink application, the mode is optional.

kinesisanalyticsv2.application.RuntimeEn.Description: The runtime environment for the application.
kinesisanalyticsv2.application.RuntimeEn.Allowed values: FLINK-1_11 | FLINK-1_13 | FLINK-1_6 | FLINK-1_8 | SQL-1_0 | ZEPPELIN-FLINK-1_0 | ZEPPELIN-FLINK-2_0

kinesisanalyticsv2.application.ServiceEx.Description: Specifies the IAM role that the application uses to access external resources.

kinesisanalyticsv2.application.Tags.Description: A list of one or more tags to assign to the application. A tag is a key-value pair that identifies an application. Note that the maximum number of application tags includes system tags. The maximum number of user-defined application tags is 50.
